label: Sciroppo di glucosio-fruttosio (HFCS)
t: sciroppo di mais ad alto contenuto di fruttosio

label: Succo/concentrato di mela o pera
t: succo concentrato di mela o pera

label: Tisana al finocchio/camomilla/chai (forte)
t: tisana al finocchio camomilla chai forte

label: Marinated meat (with garlic/honey/onion)
t: marinated meat with garlic honey onion

label: broccoli
serving: heads low at 3/4 cup; stalks low only 1/3 cup; portion-limited

label: Fennel bulb
serving: low at small serving (~1/2 cup); mannitol above

label: verza
serving: low up to 1/2 cup; moderate above

label: melone di cantalupo
serving: low up to 3/4 cup (120g); moderate at 150g+

label: melone verde
serving: low up to 1/2 cup (90g); moderate at 100g+

label: uva
serving: low only at 2-3 grapes; excess fructose above

label: Ripe banana
serving: low at 1/3 medium; high if more

label: White wheat bread
serving: low at 1 slice (35g); high in larger amounts

label: Farina di mandorle
serving: low at 1/4 cup (24g); high at 1/2 cup (48g)

label: Almond meal
serving: low at 1/4 cup (24g); high at 1/2 cup (48g)

label: Spelt sourdough bread
t: pane di farro a lievitazione naturale
serving: low at 2 slices; higher amounts increase fructans

label: Amaranth
serving: puffed amaranth low at small serve; high at full serve

label: Wheat pasta
serving: low at 1/2 cup cooked; high at larger serves

label: Pine nut
serving: low at 8g (~1 tbsp); high in larger serves

label: latte d'avena
serving: low up to ~104ml (1/4 cup); high at 250ml

label: Coconut milk (uht beverage)
serving: low at 3/4 cup; moderate at 1 cup (250ml)

label: Canned coconut milk
serving: low at 1/4-3/4 cup depending on brand

label: zucchero di fiori di cocco
serving: low at 1 tsp; high at 3+ tsp

label: sciroppo d'oro
serving: low at 1 tsp; high at 1 tbsp

label: estratto di frutto del monaco
serving: untested but widely accepted; use small amounts

label: Bbq sauce
serving: low at 2 tbsp / 46g; limit if contains onion/garlic

label: Salsa Worcestershire
serving: low in small servings (~2 tbsp); contains garlic/molasses

label: Hoisin sauce
serving: low only in small servings; check for garlic

label: succo d'arancia
serving: low at 3 oz; high in larger glass
